text_excerpt: News | Sir Geoffrey Cox KC Skip to main content Sir Geoffrey Cox KC MP Torridge and Tavistock Main navigation Home About Sir Geoffrey News Campaigns In Parliament Contact Sir Geoffrey Cox KC MP Torridge and Tavistock News Sir Geoffrey supports Tarka Line extension to Bideford Monday, 23 March, 2026 Sir Geoffrey visits the old Bideford Station with Railfuture's regional branch chair, Tim Steer, to discuss an extension to the Tarka Line. Local News Sir Geoffrey visits Bideford BMX Club 20th March 2026 Sir Geoffrey documents his visit to the brilliant Bideford BMX. Local News Sir Geoffrey holds a village hall meeting in Alverdiscott 13th March 2026 Sir Geoffrey visits parishioners in Alverdiscott to discuss the nearby solar park proposals. Local News Sir Geoffrey visits Travel Chapter in Bideford to discuss support for self-caters and the tourism sector in Torridge 13th March 2026 Sir Geoffrey documents his visit ro Travel Chapter in Bideford Local News Sir Geoffrey visits the Violet Lane campaign group 7th February 2026 Sir Geoffrey visits the Violet Lane campaign group to object to proposals for new housing developments that fall outside of the Tavistock local plan. Local News Sir Geoffrey meets Traced in Tavistock to object to new proposed housing developments that fall outside the democratically certified local plans 7th February 2026 Sir Geoffrey meets the Traced campaign group to discuss new housing proposals that would fall outside of the town's local plan. Local News Sir Geoffrey meets with local farmers in Bradworthy 2nd February 2026 Sir Geoffrey holds one of his regular farming surgeries in Bradworthy Local News Sir Geoffrey holds his inaugural Connectivity Forum in Holsworthy 30th January 2026 Sir Geoffrey documents the inaugural connectivity forum in Holsworthy to discuss a range of matters in aid of improving rural connectivity and internet access. Local News Sir Geoffrey visits Wildanet to discuss broadband connectivity in Torridge 30th January 2026 Following his connectivity forum, Sir Geoffrey meets Wildanet to discuss their role in providing broadband infrastructure in Torridge Local News Sir Geoffrey meets the Devon Highways Director to raise concerns about the state of our roads 2nd January 2026 .
